docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ALEJANDRO CRUZ AS TO DEFENDANT VELA, ALFREDO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ALEJANDRO CRUZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELA, ALFREDO $7,870.78 PRINCIPAL, $77.93 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,102.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNED TO SEQUOIA CONCEPTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA COPR DBA SEQUOIA FINANCIAL SERVICES FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ALEJANDRO CRUZ AS TO DEFENDANT VELA, ALFREDO

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RE-ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO PLTF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR FROM FORMER ASSIGNEE OF RECORD SEQUOIA CONCEPTS, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ALEJANDRO CRUZ AS TO DEFENDANT VELA, ALFREDO

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ALEJANDRO CRUZ AS TO DEFENDANT VELA, ALFREDO
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-11-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRO VELA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Alejandro Vela's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
